description_long: This is a compact, rectangular gas station fuel dispenser with a weathered, industrial appearance. The main body is constructed from metal panels, featuring a predominantly black and red color scheme with visible wear and paint chipping. The front face displays two fuel pump nozzles, each attached to a flexible black hose, and is branded with the name 'LANFENG' in bold white letters on red and blue strips. The upper section is open, framed by two vertical supports and a red canopy-like top, while the lower section has vented grilles and a large LANFENG logo. There are small display windows for fuel information and a digital meter on the front. The sides are plain with warning signs and vent grilles, and the hoses are looped and hang down the sides.
description: A weathered, rectangular LANFENG gas station fuel dispenser with dual hoses, red and black metal panels, and prominent branding. Features include display windows, a digital meter, and vented grilles.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, weathered metal panel with a yellow warning sign, vent grilles at the bottom, and a single hose hanging down.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two fuel nozzles with hoses, LANFENG branding, display windows, a digital meter, and a large logo on the lower panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, with a warning sign, vent grilles, and a hose hanging down.
description_view_3: Alternate front view, similar to view 1, showing the dual nozzles, LANFENG branding, display windows, and digital meter.
attribute_fuel_pumps: Two visible fuel pumps are integrated into the front face, each with a black hose and red nozzle. The pumps are modern in style, with digital displays and LANFENG branding in red and blue. The hoses are looped and hang down the sides.
attribute_canopy_structure: A small, flat, red canopy-like top is present, supported by two vertical metal columns at the sides. The canopy is minimal, with no visible lighting or signage attached.
attribute_station_signage: LANFENG branding is prominently displayed on the front lower panel in white on red, and again on blue and red strips above the display windows. A large LANFENG logo is also present. A yellow warning sign is visible on the side panels.
attribute_price_display_board: No price display board is visible.
